ideation: This sequence will depict a robot covering its eyes with its arms, expressing sleepiness or a desire for darkness, fitting the 'new moon' emoji.  The movement will be slow and deliberate. Frame 1: Arms start at the sides. Frame 2: Arms rise to cover the eyes. Frame 3: Arms move slightly to adjust the eye cover. Frame 4: Arms slowly return to the sides.

frames.beat: arms hang down, ready for rest
arms slowly rise to cover the eyes
arms lower, the night has passed
